* By using the site and creating an exchange, you agree to the GreenEco Terms of Services and Privacy Policy

How it Works

1

Select Your Trading Pair

Select your preferred cryptocurrency from our extensive list of options. With a wide range cryptocurrencies available, you can easily find the perfect choice that suits your needs and preferences.

2

Make a Deposit

Initiate your exchange effortlessly by entering your preferred cryptocurrency address for receipt. Simply provide your email and contact details, then click the exchange button to transfer funds to the designated deposit address with ease.

3

Receive Cryptocurrency

Enjoy instant exchange and smooth transfer of your cryptocurrency to your desired cryptocurrencies. Once the first confirmation of your crypto transaction is received, your funds are promptly cashed out to you.

Excellent Since 2015

4.6

24/7 live support

Our support team is available 24/7 to provide you with personalized assistance through email.

Best market rates

By collaborating with over 20 crypto trading platforms, we aim to secure the best rates for your transactions.

Speedy transactions

With an average transaction speed of 2–15 minutes, we enable you to quickly capitalize on market opportunities.

Secure funds handling

To ensure maximum security, we do not store cryptocurrencies; instead, they are sent directly to your wallet or account after the exchange.

The best crypto exchange experience I’ve had! GreenEco’s platform is reliable and their customer support is top-notch.

James B.

GreenEco ensures my crypto transactions are secure and fast. I wouldn’t trust any other platform with my exchanges.

Join Our Partner List

FAQ

What is GreenEco?

GreenEco is a user-friendly and eco-friendly cryptocurrency exchange platform that prioritizes security, customer satisfaction, and sustainability. We provide a seamless and reliable trading experience for buying, selling, and trading a wide range of cryptocurrencies.


Instant Transactions

Get instant access to your funds with our fast and secure transaction processing. Our platform is designed to provide the fastest possible transaction times, so you can buy, sell, and trade cryptocurrencies quickly and easily.

Swap Cryptocurrencies

Our advanced swap technology allows for fast and secure exchanges between cryptocurrencies, with no fees from our side and no need for intermediaries. Whether you want to swap Bitcoin for Ethereum or any other cryptocurrency, we've got you covered.

Offshore and Secure

Based in Seychelles, we operate with a strong commitment to regulatory compliance and user protection. Our platform utilizes robust encryption protocols and multi-factor authentication to ensure the highest level of safety for our users.

Maximizing your privacy and security is our top priority.

How do I get started on GreenEco and is a registration required?

To get started, you need to select your cryptocurrency pair and then you can start trading cryptocurrencies on the main page.
No registration is required. Simply visit the website and start trading right away.

Are there any fees, and how much is the fee for exchanging on GreenEco?

No, GreenEco does not charge any fees for transactions or exchanges. You can enjoy fee-free trading and exchanges on the platform.
There are no fees on GreenEco because every crypto transaction incurs its own fees, and our miners at GreenEco handle these transactions on our platform, from which we profit.

Is a verification or KYC process required to trade

No, GreenEco does not require users to undergo any verification or KYC (Know Your Customer) process in order to trade, exchange, or swap cryptocurrencies.
GreenEco values user privacy and aims to provide a seamless and hassle-free experience for cryptocurrency transactions. Whether you are a beginner or an experienced trader, you can freely engage in cryptocurrency activities on GreenEco without the need for any additional verification steps.
Enjoy the convenience and flexibility of trading, exchanging, or swapping cryptocurrencies without any burdensome verification requirements on GreenEco.

What happens if I send less or too much than I entered on the GreenEco exchange?

The transaction or exchange process on GreenEco starts automatically after the first transaction is confirmed on the respective cryptocurrency blockchain.
Once the initial transaction is confirmed, the subsequent exchange or payout of the other cryptocurrency or fiat money such as PayPal, Payoneer, Skrill, Neteller, Wise, CashApp, Perfect Money or Bank transfer is processed and paid out to the customer instantly.

How long does a transaction or exchange take on GreenEco?

The transaction or exchange process on GreenEco starts automatically after the first transaction is confirmed on the respective cryptocurrency blockchain.
Once the initial transaction is confirmed, the subsequent exchange or payout of the other cryptocurrency or fiat money such as PayPal, Payoneer, Skrill, Neteller, Wise, CashApp, Perfect Money or Bank transfer is processed and paid out to the customer instantly.

How can I contact GreenEco support for help or with questions?

If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback, we would love to hear from you! You can reach out to GreenEco Exchange through the following methods:

  • Visit our Contact tab on our website to fill out our contact form.
  • Email us directly at support@greeneco-exchange.com.

Our support team is here to assist you, and we strive to respond to all inquiries as quickly as possible.

Can I deposit fiat currency (traditional currency) on GreenEco?

No, GreenEco is exclusively a cryptocurrency exchange for exchanging and swapping crypto coins.
However, you can withdraw your cryptocurrency to fiat money in the form of bank transfers, PayPal, Skrill and many other options.

Which cryptocurrencies are supported on GreenEco?

GreenEco supports a wide range of cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Litecoin (LTC), Monero (XMR), Ripple (XRP) and many others.
The platform continuously adds new coins based on market demand and popularity.
